item.title: 25 yo pizza delivery man runs into burning house, saves four children who tell him another kid is in the house. He goes back in, finds the girl, jumps out a window with her, and carries her to a cop who captures the moment on his bodycam
item.dc:creator: Muppy

item.title: Morning Routine
item.description: I've been doing this every day, Mon-Friday for the last couple months. After I call her three "offices", I do the same with other Senate and Congress members. It takes me usually about 30 min to call all the different office lines that I know might not go directly to a machine. Later in the day I'll call the west coast offices. If someone answers, I say my line, don't give them any of my information, and I stay as respectful as the person answering allows me to be. MTG's Georgia offices are used to it by now, and at this point greet me by the name on their caller ID, and tell me to have a nice day when I'm done. Most reps are really respectful, however some are not. I really don't want to keep doing this because honestly, I feel like I'm being a child and not accomplishing anything. But then every morning I read something infuriating that they've said or done, and I'm back at it. FP Edit: I was almost hoping this would die in usersub, but thanks for the support! It still makes me nervous everytime I call, because I'm not trying to have my life and family affected by any sort of retaliation. I will post a few of the sites I use to find numbers, but all I do is google "'so-and-so's' office numbers" and go from there. I don't support cursing at, harassing, or name calling to the people answering the phones, who are more than likely unpaid interns. Some people will ask for a name and zip code, and I tell them "no thanks". I only call and talk with someone once a day, and don't repeat dial. I'll try a few times within the hour, and if no one picks up, I move on and try again the next day. https://greene.house.gov/contact/offices https://boebert.house.gov/contact/offices https://www.cruz.senate.gov/contact/office-locations https://www.hawley.senate.gov/contact-senator-hawley https://cqrcengage.com/dealer/app/person/310?0
item.dc:creator: MysterEF8

item.title: Libraries around the world thread
item.description:
Admont Abbey Library, Austria
Bibliothèque Nationale de France, Paris
British Library, London
George Peabody Library, Maryland
Tianjin Binhai Library, China
The Library of Trinity College Dublin, Ireland
Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Egypt
State Library, Melbourne
Stuttgart City Library, Germany
Baroque Library of Metten Abbey, Germany
National Library, Dublin
Biblioteca de Convento de Mafra, Portugal
Real Gabinete Português de Leitura, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
Stiftsbibliothek Sankt Gallen, St Gallen, Switzerland
Bibliothèque Sainte-Geneviève, Paris, France
Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
El Ateneo Grand Splendid, Buenos Aires, Argentina
Library of Parliament, Ottawa
Royal Library of San Lorenzo de El Escorial, Madrid, Spain
The Morgan Library, United States
Library of Congress, Washington DC, United States
John Rylands Library, Manchester England
The Vennesla Library, Norway
The Iowa State Law Library, Des Moines
Strahovská Knihovna, Prague, Czech Republic
Seattle Central Library, Seattle
Starfield Library in Seoul, South Korea
National Library of China in Beijing, China
State Library of New South Wales
New York Public Library, United States
item.dc:creator: TrytoTry

item.title: Mental Garbage Dump
item.description:
Need a bit of a mental break from the doom scrolling so this will be the last dump for a while
This will be the theme song playing in my head for the rest of summer
du dun dun dudun - paaa pa pa pa paa
Crab Tax
item.dc:creator: Doomgriever

item.title: Uvalde report: officers had training for this situation and knew what to do, but didn’t do anything.
item.description: Apparently the chief in charge #, Arredondo, and all officers knew what to do in the training. But the chief only checked one room and didn’t check the other rooms and told everyone it was a barricade situation with no kids. TL;DR: Almost everyone in this godforsaken department is an incompetent fucking moron. https://twitter.com/tracy_walder/status/1548787687804502016?s=21&t=8HFQqeFwUvZ_KWZkE9fD5Q
item.dc:creator: tfon12

item.title: My friend worked at a restaurant and she said Sunday Brunch after Church was the worst shift. She got tipped pennies all the time and she was a bad ass.

item.title: Russia Makes Up Outlandish Story To Expalin Why They're Getting Their Asses Kicked In Ukraine
item.description: https://www.thedailybeast.com/russia-says-its-losing-because-ukraine-has-experimental-mutant-troops-created-in-secret-biolabss?ref=scroll This reads like sci-fi but we all know it's delusions of a madman with brain cancer. This isn't Putin's first claim of super soldiers either. This is from 2017: https://www.bbc.com/news/world-55905354
item.dc:creator: TheRealSleepIsForChumps
